audio.soonDesc: Podcast → Shorts, audio visualization, and more features coming soon

images.soonDesc: Text to Image, background removal, and more features coming soon

tools.soonDesc: Subtitle generator, thumbnail maker, script writer, and more

login.subtitle: Sign in to admin panel
login.footer: Users are created by the super admin

empty.title: No videos yet
empty.subtitle: Add your first video — AI will split it into shorts automatically

newVideo.title: New Video
newVideo.subtitle: Enter a video — AI will split it into shorts
newVideo.urlHint: YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Vimeo and other platforms
newVideo.orClick: or click to browse · max 500 MB
newVideo.smartSub: You set the number of shorts — AI auto-picks and arranges the key clips
newVideo.simpleSub: Splits the video into even sequential parts
newVideo.subtitlesHint: Words light up in sync with speech (AI)
newVideo.smartInfo: Each short is a 30–60s compilation auto-assembled by AI from the video's key moments. Shorts differ from each other.
newVideo.simpleInfo: Each short is one contiguous segment, at least 30s. Video length ÷ shorts must be ≥ 30s.
newVideo.proSub: Like Smart, but crops to 9:16 following the mouse / on-screen action (for screen recordings)
newVideo.proInfo: Each short is built from key moments but, instead of blur bars, it crops to 9:16 while following the mouse / action. Ideal for screen & monitor recordings.

errors.shortsRange: Number of shorts must be between 1 and 10

job.pollError: Lost contact with the server. Refresh the page.
job.resultError: The job finished but its result could not be loaded. Check History.
job.cancelConfirm: Cancel this job? It stops once the current stage finishes.

security.title: Change Password
security.subtitle: We recommend using a strong password
security.tooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters

ai.title: AI Provider
ai.subtitle: Set the .env variables matching the selected provider
ai.restartHint: After saving: cd backend && make dev
ai.note: AI settings are managed via the .env file. Restart the backend server after changes.

form.title: New User
form.subtitle: Create an admin or regular user

subtitlePage.title: Subtitle a video
subtitlePage.subtitle: Subtitle any video — AI aligns your text to the audio
subtitlePage.videoHint: Vertical short or horizontal video — any size and length
subtitlePage.textPlaceholder: Paste the spoken text from the video here, in order...
subtitlePage.textHint: Provide the ready text — AI places each word at its best-matching moment
subtitlePage.info: No STT needed: Whisper only measures the timing, the words come from your text — so subtitles are 100% accurate. The video doesn't have to be a short: it works on any video.
subtitlePage.step1: Whisper finds the exact time of every word in the audio
subtitlePage.step2: AI aligns your text to those moments by similarity
subtitlePage.step3: Subtitles are burned over the video at its original size

editor.title: Video editor
editor.subtitle: Trim your video, fit it to a format and add text
editor.subtitlePro: Cut and join several pieces, fit the format and add timed captions
editor.uploadHint: To cut, montage and add text
editor.timelineHint: Coloured blocks are kept parts. Click a block to edit it.
editor.textsHint: Add a caption at the moment you need — you can add several.
editor.cutHelp: Click the strip to place the playhead → Split → select an unwanted piece and Remove.
editor.fitCropHint: Frame is fully filled, edges are cropped
editor.fitPadHint: Whole frame is visible, blurred background on the edges

errors.range: At least one valid segment is required
errors.shortMax: Short mode total length must not exceed 60 seconds

toolHub.title: Tools
toolHub.subtitle: Quick tools for video, audio and images

speed.name: Speed
speed.desc: Speed up or slow down the video

gif.name: Make GIF
gif.desc: Create a GIF from the video

extract_audio.name: Extract audio
extract_audio.desc: Pull the audio (MP3) from a video

trim.name: Trim audio
trim.desc: Cut out the part you need

pitch.name: Pitch
pitch.desc: Shift the pitch up or down

crop.name: Crop image
crop.desc: Crop the image to a format

watermark.name: Logo (watermark)
watermark.desc: Overlay a logo / watermark on the video

concat.name: Join audio
concat.desc: Concatenate several audio files into one

mix.name: Mix (voice + music)
mix.desc: Add background music under a voice track

media.formatsVideo: MP4, MOV, MKV, WEBM… · click to choose
media.formatsAudio: MP3, WAV, M4A, FLAC… · click to choose

transcribe.title: Transcribe (STT)
transcribe.subtitle: Upload audio or video — get text with timestamps
transcribe.drop: Drop an audio or video file here
transcribe.formats: MP3, WAV, M4A… or MP4, MOV, MKV… · or click
transcribe.processingHint: Whisper is converting the audio to text

cleanup.title: Audio cleanup
cleanup.subtitle: Audio or video — normalises loudness and removes noise
cleanup.formats: MP3, WAV, MP4, MOV… · or click
cleanup.info: Loudness normalisation (loudnorm) + noise reduction (afftdn). Audio also gets long silences trimmed. Video keeps its picture, only the audio is improved.

separate.title: Vocal / music separation
separate.subtitle: Split a song into voice and music — for karaoke or clean vocals
separate.processingHint: Demucs is splitting voice and music (takes a moment)
separate.info: The Demucs AI model splits the track into vocals and music. For video, a karaoke (no-vocals) version is also produced.

tts.title: Text to Speech
tts.subtitle: Type text — AI turns it into natural speech
tts.textPlaceholder: Type the text to read aloud…
tts.info: Coqui XTTS-v2 turns text into natural speech. Uzbek text is read with Turkish pronunciation. Upload a sample to speak in that voice.
tts.processingHint: XTTS is turning text into speech (model downloads on first run)

dub.title: Translate & dub
dub.subtitle: Translate the speech in a video to another language and re-voice it
dub.formats: MP4, MOV, MP3, WAV… · or click
dub.processingHint: Transcribe → translate → re-voice → mux (takes a while)
dub.info: Whisper transcribes, an LLM translates, XTTS re-voices (cloning the original speaker), and the new audio is time-fit to the original timing and muxed back.

image.title: Remove background
image.subtitle: Automatically cut out the background — transparent PNG
image.info: The rembg (u2net) AI model keeps the main subject and makes the background transparent. Output is PNG.

img2short.title: Image to Short
img2short.subtitle: Turn several images into a 9:16 short video
img2short.drop: Drop images here or click to select
img2short.info: Each image is shown for a few seconds with a slow zoom and crossfades.

audioMerge.concatHint: Files are joined in upload order

videoMerge.title: Merge videos
videoMerge.subtitle: Join several clips and animate the cut between scenes
videoMerge.concatHint: Clips are joined in the order shown. Use the arrows to reorder.
videoMerge.transitionHint: The effect shown when moving from one clip to the next
